mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id AS memberId, balance, granted_monthly AS grantedMonthly, used_monthly AS usedMonthly, ym, expires_at AS expiresAt FROM sm_token_wallet WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND ym = #{ym}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sm_token_wallet (member_id, balance, granted_monthly, used_monthly, ym, expires_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{balance}, #{grantedMonthly}, 0, #{ym}, #{expiresAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE balance = #{balance}, granted_monthly = #{grantedMonthly}, expires_at = #{expiresAt}, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE sm_token_wallet SET used_monthly = used_monthly + #{amount}, balance = balance - #{amount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND ym = #{ym}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sm_token_ledger (member_id, type, amount, balance_after, description, project_id, expires_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{description}, #{projectId}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sm_token_ledger WHERE member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT plan_id AS planId, category, name, monthly_price AS monthlyPrice, yearly_price AS yearlyPrice, tokens_monthly AS tokensMonthly, per_member AS perMember, min_members AS minMembers, max_members AS maxMembers, collaboration, role_management AS roleManagement, comments, approval_workflow AS approvalWorkflow, batch_automation AS batchAutomation, priority_render AS priorityRender, api_access AS apiAccess, watermark, white_label AS whiteLabel, invoice_support AS invoiceSupport, max_video_quality AS maxVideoQuality, support_level AS supportLevel, IFNULL(max_projects, -1) AS maxProjects FROM sm_plan_config WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND active = 1

SELECT plan_id AS planId, category, name, monthly_price AS monthlyPrice, yearly_price AS yearlyPrice, tokens_monthly AS tokensMonthly, per_member AS perMember, min_members AS minMembers, max_members AS maxMembers, watermark, max_video_quality AS maxVideoQuality, IFNULL(max_projects, -1) AS maxProjects FROM sm_plan_config WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY id
SELECT feature_key AS featureKey, name, token_cost AS tokenCost, category FROM sm_feature_cost WHERE feature_key = #{featureKey} AND is_active = 1
SELECT id, name, tokens, price, price_per_token AS pricePerToken, is_recommended AS isRecommended, sort_order AS sortOrder FROM sm_token_package WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT id, name, tokens, price, price_per_token AS pricePerToken, is_recommended AS isRecommended, is_active AS isActive, sort_order AS sortOrder FROM sm_token_package WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, member_id AS memberId, balance, ym, expires_at AS expiresAt FROM sm_token_wallet WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND balance > 0 AND expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at > NOW() AND expires_at <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY) ORDER BY expires_at ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, member_id AS memberId, balance, ym, expires_at AS expiresAt FROM sm_token_wallet WHERE expires_at <= NOW() AND balance > 0
